steps.title: Identify the key signal in context
steps.content: The passage says elements of the Spanish-mission style “have been reproduced throughout the state” and then gives Santa Clara University as an example. The blank must describe what the university does with the mission style — and “reproduced” is the key word: the university copied or modeled its design after that style.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'renovate': means to restore or modernize an existing structure — Santa Clara University did not restore old missions; it built new structures in that style. ✗
  • Choice B — 'imitate': means to copy or model after — exactly matches “reproduced”; the university’s design copies the Spanish-mission style. ✓
  • Choice C — 'neglect': means to ignore or fail to care for — the opposite of what the passage says; the university actively adopted the style. ✗
  • Choice D — 'reject': means to refuse or turn away — contradicts the passage entirely; the university embraced, not rejected, the mission style. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
